people.description: Browses products, manages cart, places orders, pays
people.name: Customer

people.description: Manages product catalogue, monitors orders, assigns roles
people.name: Administrator

softwareSystems.description: Open-source identity provider. Hosts the antkart realm with user/admin roles. Issues JWT tokens.
softwareSystems.name: Keycloak 24

softwareSystems.description: Payment gateway. Creates order objects, processes card payments, returns HMAC-SHA256 signatures.
softwareSystems.name: Razorpay

softwareSystems.description: Email delivery. Mailhog SMTP trap in dev; Gmail SMTP in production.
softwareSystems.name: SMTP / Mailhog

softwareSystems.description: Observability. Elasticsearch stores structured JSON logs. Kibana provides dashboards.
softwareSystems.name: ELK Stack

softwareSystems.description: AMQP message broker. Fans out integration events. Hosts SAGA state machine queues.
softwareSystems.name: RabbitMQ 3

containers.description: Single entry point. JWT passthrough, per-route rate limiting (10-30 RPS), QoS circuit breaker.
containers.name: AK.Gateway

containers.description: Keycloak proxy. Login, register, token refresh, /me, admin user list, role assignment.
containers.name: AK.UserIdentity

relationships.description: Token issue, user CRUD, role assignment

containers.description: Product catalogue. CRUD with category filtering. Calls Discount via gRPC. Consumes OrderCreated to reserve stock.
containers.name: AK.Products

containers.description: Discount coupon service. Exposes GetDiscount RPC. 300 seed coupons keyed by SKU.
containers.name: AK.Discount

containers.description: Shopping cart. Add, update, remove, clear. JSON snapshots in Redis with 30-day TTL.
containers.name: AK.ShoppingCart

components.description: Maps HTTP verbs to MediatR Send() calls. UserId from JWT sub claim. Admin-only on PUT /status.
components.name: OrderEndpoints

components.description: Dispatches IRequest to exactly one handler. Runs ValidationBehavior pipeline.
components.name: MediatR

components.description: Creates Order aggregate. Outbox publishes OrderCreatedIntegrationEvent.
components.name: CreateOrderCommandHandler

components.description: Returns Result<OrderDto>. Domain state machine enforces transitions.
components.name: UpdateOrderStatusCommandHandler

components.description: GetOrderById, GetOrders, GetOrdersByUser. Specification pattern for filters.
components.name: Query Handlers

components.description: States: Initial → StockPending → Confirmed|Cancelled. Persisted to PostgreSQL.
components.name: OrderSaga

components.description: EF Core IQueryable. GetByIdAsync, FindAsync with ISpecification.
components.name: OrderRepository

components.description: SaveChangesAsync dispatches domain events via Outbox. Atomic: row + outbox.
components.name: UnitOfWork

components.description: Orders, OrderItems, SAGA state, Outbox tables. Fluent API config.
components.name: OrderDbContext

containers.description: Order lifecycle. SAGA for stock reservation + payment. CQRS + MediatR. EF Core Outbox.
containers.name: AK.Order

containers.description: Payment processing. Razorpay orders, HMAC-SHA256 verification, saved cards (token IDs only).
containers.name: AK.Payments

containers.description: Event-driven emails. 6 consumers, HTML templates, MailKit dispatch. 90-day cleanup.
containers.name: AK.Notification

containers.description: Document store for product catalogue. StringEntity IDs.
containers.name: MongoDB

containers.description: Relational store for coupon records. EF Core migrations.
containers.name: SQLite

containers.description: In-memory key-value store. One key per user cart. 30-day TTL.
containers.name: Redis

containers.description: Orders, items, SAGA state, Outbox messages.
containers.name: PostgreSQL (Orders)

containers.description: Payment records and saved card tokens.
containers.name: PostgreSQL (Payments)

softwareSystems.description: Cloud-native .NET 9 microservices e-commerce platform with 8 services, SAGA orchestration, CQRS, and event-driven architecture.
softwareSystems.name: AntKart Platform

componentViews.description: Level 3 — Inside AK.Order: CQRS, SAGA, Outbox
componentViews.name: Component View: AntKart Platform - AK.Order

containerViews.description: Level 2 — Deployable units and their communication
containerViews.name: Container View: AntKart Platform

dynamicViews.description: Happy-path order placement: Create → Stock → Payment → Confirm
dynamicViews.name: Dynamic View: AntKart Platform

systemContextViews.description: Level 1 — Who uses AntKart and what does it depend on?
systemContextViews.name: System Context View: AntKart Platform
